meta.name: Amar Sarkar
meta.title: DevOps / SRE Engineer
meta.tagline: I build reliable, scalable infrastructure and automate everything I can.

about.headline: Building scalable infrastructure and observability systems.
paragraphs: I'm a DevOps and SRE Engineer with 4+ years of experience managing cloud infrastructure, Kubernetes platforms, and observability systems. I enjoy solving complex production issues and building automation that improves reliability and efficiency.
My work focuses on infrastructure as code, monitoring at scale, and optimizing distributed systems. I’m particularly interested in observability, system performance, and cloud-native architectures.

experience.description: Led infrastructure migration and observability improvements across production environments. Managed 500+ workloads with zero downtime and migrated a 3TB monitoring stack, improving system visibility and reducing incident response time by 40%.
Built CI/CD pipelines and deployed containerized applications on Kubernetes (EKS/AKS). Improved uptime to 99.95% through monitoring, automation, and infrastructure optimization.

projects.title: PostgreSQL High Availability on Kubernetes
projects.description: Designed and deployed a PostgreSQL HA cluster across two Kubernetes clusters using Helm, ensuring high availability, failover, and data consistency for production workloads.

projects.title: End-to-End EKS Deployment Pipeline
projects.description: Built complete CI/CD pipeline from development to production using AWS EKS, GitHub Actions, and Argo CD with GitOps approach, enabling automated, reliable, and scalable deployments.

projects.title: Monitoring Stack Migration
projects.description: Migrated a 3TB ELK, Prometheus, and Grafana stack from cloud to on-prem infrastructure, improving performance, reducing costs, and enhancing observability.

projects.title: Infrastructure Automation with Terraform
projects.description: Developed Terraform modules to provision VMware ESXi VMs from templates, reducing setup time from 3 hours to under 1 hour.

projects.title: Centralized Monitoring Deployment
projects.description: Built Ansible-based automation to deploy Grafana dashboards, Windows Exporter, and Filebeat with GitLab CI for consistent observability setup.

projects.title: Redis Automation Tool
projects.description: Automated Redis deployment using Ansible for one-click provisioning across environments, improving consistency and reducing manual errors.
